import uno
from com.sun.star.beans import PropertyValue
from com.sun.star.sheet import CellFlags
from com.sun.star.table import BorderLine, TableBorder
from com.sun.star.awt import Color

# Connect to LibreOffice
localContext = uno.getComponentContext()
resolver = localContext.ServiceManager.createInstanceWithContext(
    "com.sun.star.bridge.UnoUrlResolver", localContext)

try:
    ctx = resolver.resolve(
        "uno:socket,host=localhost,port=2002;urp;StarOffice.ComponentContext")
    smgr = ctx.ServiceManager
    desktop = smgr.createInstanceWithContext("com.sun.star.frame.Desktop", ctx)
    
    # Get the current document
    doc = desktop.getCurrentComponent()
    
    if doc is None:
        print("No document open")
        exit(1)
    
    sheet = doc.getSheets().getByIndex(0)
    
    # Create cell border
    border_line = BorderLine()
    border_line.Color = 0x000000  # Black
    border_line.InnerLineWidth = 1
    border_line.OuterLineWidth = 1
    border_line.LineDistance = 0
    
    table_border = TableBorder()
    table_border.TopLine = border_line
    table_border.BottomLine = border_line
    table_border.LeftLine = border_line
    table_border.RightLine = border_line
    table_border.HorizontalLine = border_line
    table_border.VerticalLine = border_line
    
    # Helper function to set cell value and format
    def set_cell(sheet, col, row, value, bold=False, bg_color=None, font_size=None):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(col, row)
        if isinstance(value, str) and value.startswith('='):
            cell.setFormula(value[1:])
        else:
            cell.setString(str(value))
        
        if bold:
            cell.setPropertyValue("CharWeight", 150)  # Bold
        if bg_color:
            cell.setPropertyValue("CellBackColor", bg_color)
        if font_size:
            cell.setPropertyValue("CharHeight", font_size)
        return cell
    
    # Helper to format as currency
    def format_currency(cell):
        cell.NumberFormat = doc.NumberFormats.getByKey(
            doc.NumberFormats.queryKey("$#,##0.00", doc.getSheets().getByIndex(0), True))
    
    # Colors
    HEADER_BG = 0x4472C4  # Blue
    INCOME_BG = 0xC6E0B4  # Light green
    EXPENSE_BG = 0xF4B084  # Light orange
    NET_BG = 0xFFD966     # Light yellow
    
    # Row 1: Headers
    months = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Total"]
    for i, month in enumerate(months):
        cell = set_cell(sheet, i+1, 0, month, bold=True, bg_color=HEADER_BG, font_size=12)
        cell.setPropertyValue("HoriJustify", 2)  # Center
    
    # INCOME SECTION
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 1, "INCOME", bold=True, bg_color=INCOME_BG, font_size=14)
    
    # Row 3: Salary
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 2, "Salary")
    salary_values = [5000, 5000, 5200, 5000, 5000, 5500]
    for i, val in enumerate(salary_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 2)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 2)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B3:G3)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 4: Freelance
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 3, "Freelance")
    freelance_values = [800, 1200, 600, 1500, 900, 1100]
    for i, val in enumerate(freelance_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 3)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 3)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B4:G4)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 5: Investments
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 4, "Investments")
    invest_values = [300, 350, 400, 380, 420, 450]
    for i, val in enumerate(invest_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 4)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 4)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B5:G5)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 6: Total Income
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 5, "Total Income", bold=True, bg_color=INCOME_BG)
    for col in range(1, 8):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(col, 5)
        cell.setFormula(f"SUM(B{col}:B{col})" if col < 7 else "SUM(B6:G6)")
        cell.setFormula(f"SUM(B{3}:B{5})") if col < 7 else cell.setFormula("SUM(B6:G6)")
        if col < 7:
            cell.setFormula(f"SUM(B{3}:B{5})")
        else:
            cell.setFormula("SUM(B6:G6)")
        format_currency(cell)
    
    # Fix Total Income formulas
    for col in range(1, 7):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(col, 5)
        col_letter = chr(ord('A') + col)
        cell.setFormula(f"SUM({col_letter}3:{col_letter}5)")
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 5)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B6:G6)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # EXPENSES SECTION
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 7, "EXPENSES", bold=True, bg_color=EXPENSE_BG, font_size=14)
    
    # Row 9: Rent
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 8, "Rent")
    for i in range(6):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 8)
        cell.setValue(1500)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 8)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B9:G9)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 10: Utilities
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 9, "Utilities")
    util_values = [150, 180, 160, 170, 155, 190]
    for i, val in enumerate(util_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 9)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 9)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B10:G10)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 11: Food
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 10, "Food")
    food_values = [600, 650, 580, 620, 590, 700]
    for i, val in enumerate(food_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 10)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 10)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B11:G11)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 12: Transport
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 11, "Transport")
    trans_values = [200, 220, 210, 200, 230, 240]
    for i, val in enumerate(trans_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 11)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 11)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B12:G12)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 13: Entertainment
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 12, "Entertainment")
    ent_values = [300, 400, 250, 350, 280, 450]
    for i, val in enumerate(ent_values):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(i+1, 12)
        cell.setValue(val)
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 12)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B13:G13)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # Row 14: Total Expenses
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 13, "Total Expenses", bold=True, bg_color=EXPENSE_BG)
    for col in range(1, 7):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(col, 13)
        col_letter = chr(ord('A') + col)
        cell.setFormula(f"SUM({col_letter}9:{col_letter}13)")
        format_currency(cell)
    cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(7, 13)
    cell.setFormula("SUM(B14:G14)")
    format_currency(cell)
    
    # NET INCOME
    set_cell(sheet, 0, 15, "NET INCOME", bold=True, bg_color=NET_BG, font_size=14)
    for col in range(1, 8):
        cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(col, 15)
        col_letter = chr(ord('A') + col)
        cell.setFormula(f"{col_letter}6-{col_letter}14")
        format_currency(cell)
    
    # Add borders to data area
    for row in range(0, 16):
        for col in range(0, 8):
            cell = sheet.getCellByPosition(col, row)
            cell.setPropertyValue("TableBorder", table_border)
    
    # Auto-size columns
    for col in range(8):
        sheet.getColumns().getByIndex(col).setPropertyValue("OptimalWidth", True)
    
    print("Budget spreadsheet created successfully!")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc()
